title: ascolabium pumilum
intro: Ascolabium pumilum, also known as the short Ascolabium or Ascolabium pumilum, is a species of orchid native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ascolabium pumilum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Ascolabium pumilum typically involve the use of its roots or leaves, which can be dried, crushed, or steeped in hot water to make teas or infusions for medicinal purposes.
